level_1_syntax/app.py.description: Missing colon at end of function definition for greet(name)
Tab character used for indentation inside add() in an otherwise space-indented file
json module imported but never used
Mutable default argument (options=[]) in Config.__init__; list is shared across all instances
Method named list shadows the built-in list type
Comparison to True using == instead of identity check with `is`

level_2_logic/calculator.py.description: divide() performs no zero-division guard; raises ZeroDivisionError when b=0
average() slices off the last element before summing (numbers[:-1]), producing a wrong result
is_palindrome() is case-sensitive; 'Racecar' is not detected as a palindrome
factorial() has no base case; factorial(0) and factorial(1) recurse infinitely causing RecursionError
find_max() initialises max_val to 0; returns 0 for any all-negative input list

level_3_async/api_handler.js.description: fetch() call is missing await; response is a Promise object, so response.json() throws
Promise.all receives the original ids array instead of the results (Promise[]) array
Cache miss check and cache write are separated by an await; concurrent calls both miss and duplicate the fetch
loadDashboard() has no .catch() and is not async/try-catch; rejections are silently swallowed
async callback inside forEach is not awaited by forEach; processUsers resolves before any fetch completes

level_4_security/database.py.description: SQL injection: username is interpolated directly into the query string instead of using parameterised queries
Password hashed with MD5 which is cryptographically broken; no salt is applied
pickle.loads() deserialises untrusted bytes, enabling arbitrary code execution
Hardcoded plaintext credential (admin_password) committed in source code
Path traversal: filename is concatenated to base_dir without sanitisation, allowing access to arbitrary files
